text:
10/01/2023
898 PRSNL_HYGN_INTRM_CD PRSNL_HYGN_INTRM_CD GG0130I5 Personal Hygiene (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the resident's ability to perform personal hygiene during this assessment period plus two previous calendar days. 06=Independent 
05=Setup or clean-up assistance 
04=Supervision or touching assistance 
03=Partial/moderate assistance 
02=Substantial/maximal assistance 
01=Dependent 

If activity was not attempted, code reason:
07=Resident refused
09=Not
